items.question: What is Open CoDesign?
items.answer: Open CoDesign is an open-source desktop AI design tool. It turns natural-language prompts into HTML prototypes, React components, slide decks, PDFs, and marketing assets while running on the user's laptop with user-controlled model access.

items.question: Is Open CoDesign free?
items.answer: Yes. Open CoDesign is MIT licensed and free to download, use, modify, and redistribute. Users pay only the model provider they choose, when that provider is paid.

items.question: Which AI models does Open CoDesign support?
items.answer: Open CoDesign supports Anthropic Claude, OpenAI GPT, Google Gemini, DeepSeek, OpenRouter, SiliconFlow, local Ollama, OpenAI-compatible endpoints, keyless IP-allowlisted proxies, and ChatGPT Plus / Codex subscription login.

items.question: Does Open CoDesign send my prompts or designs to the cloud?
items.answer: No. Designs, prompts, settings, generated files, and v0.2 workspace-backed sessions stay on the user's machine by default. The only outbound network traffic is to the model provider the user configures.

items.question: Which platforms are supported?
items.answer: Open CoDesign supports macOS Apple Silicon, macOS Intel, Windows x64, Windows ARM64, and Linux packages including AppImage, deb, and rpm.

items.question: Open CoDesign 是什么？
items.answer: Open CoDesign 是一款开源桌面 AI 设计工具，可以把自然语言提示词转换成 HTML 原型、React 组件、幻灯片、PDF 和营销素材，并在用户本机运行。

items.question: Open CoDesign 免费吗？
items.answer: 免费。Open CoDesign 使用 MIT 协议，用户可以免费下载、使用、修改和分发。若使用付费模型，只需要向自己选择的模型提供商付费。

items.question: Open CoDesign 支持哪些模型？
items.answer: Open CoDesign 支持 Anthropic Claude、OpenAI GPT、Google Gemini、DeepSeek、OpenRouter、SiliconFlow、本地 Ollama、OpenAI 兼容端点、keyless IP 白名单代理，以及 ChatGPT Plus / Codex 订阅登录。

items.question: Open CoDesign 会把我的提示词或设计发到云端吗？
items.answer: 不会。设计、提示词、设置、生成文件和 v0.2 的真实工作区 session 默认都保存在用户本机。唯一对外网络流量是用户自己配置的模型提供商请求。

items.question: Open CoDesign 支持哪些平台？
items.answer: Open CoDesign 支持 macOS Apple Silicon、macOS Intel、Windows x64、Windows ARM64，以及 Linux AppImage、deb、rpm 安装包。

items.question: Which package managers are live for v0.2.0?
items.answer: GitHub Releases, Homebrew Cask, and Scoop are live for v0.2.0. The winget manifest has been submitted and is waiting for Microsoft review.

items.question: v0.2.0 哪些包管理器已经可用？
items.answer: GitHub Releases、Homebrew Cask 和 Scoop 已经可用。winget manifest 已提交，正在等 Microsoft review。
